# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# kong-config.yaml
services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1_url/
  - name: service2
    url: http://service2_url/

routes:
  - name: route1
    hosts:
      - host1.example.com
      - host2.example.com
    paths:
      - /api/service1
      - /api/service2
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    service: 
        name: service1
  - name: route2
    hosts:
      - host3.example.com
    paths:
      - /api/service2
    methods:
      - GET
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    service: 
        name: service2
